content: No proof artifacts may be created unless the hard gate passes.
Proof 010 remains synthetic fixture validation only.
Proof 011 defines the candidate-selection gate and eligibility rules for public or redacted-real traces.
Belief Ledger commit 1c89d45 is required for safe claim-boundary detection before rerunning the candidate-risk gate.
Candidate-risk gate passed only after safe-negated claim-boundary language was treated as a boundary, not claim escalation.
